description: capital of the State of Sinaloa, Mexico
description_wiki: Culiacán, officially Culiacán Rosales, is the capital and largest city of Sinaloa in northwestern Mexico.

Sinaloa (Spanish pronunciation: [sinaˈloa] ), officially the Estado Libre y Soberano de Sinaloa (English: Free and Sovereign State of Sinaloa), is one of the 31 states which, along with Mexico City, compose the Federal Entities of Mexico.

description: ocean between Asia, Australia and the Americas
description_wiki: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of Earth's five oceanic divisions.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.
Mexico, officially the United Mexican States, is a country in North America.

description: title of the Virgin Mary as she appeared to an Indigenous man in Mexico in December 1531
description_wiki: Our Lady of Guadalupe (Spanish: Nuestra Señora de Guadalupe), also known as the Virgin of Guadalupe (Spanish: Virgen de Guadalupe) and as La Virgen Morena, is a Catholic title of the Blessed Virgin Mary associated with four Marian apparitions to Juan Diego and one to his uncle, Juan Bernardino reported in December 1531, when the Mexican territories were part of the Spanish Empire.
